title: GMS OreUI
description: A texture pack that it's based on the Bedrock Edition UI, the OreUI, bringing it to java.
body:
### This pack is compatible with Axiom and Shulker Box Tooltip mods. OptiGUI is required to have custom containers, such as colored shulkers or unique chests containers.

This pack changes all the UIs and Fonts, with a design based on Bedrock Edition UI, which is the OreUI, bringing it to Java Edition.

It changes all buttons, sliders, fonts and containers, adding custom containers for blocks such as Chests, Colored Shulkers, Barrel and much more!

See the gallery for some examples.
